root_cause: "the nightly data sync" lacks the validation, retries, or alerting to keep it reliable.
permanent_solution: Harden "the nightly data sync" so it stops breaking and self-heals when it does.
workflow: Resilient workflow for "the nightly data sync" with validation and retries.
automation: Automation that retries "the nightly data sync" with backoff and alerts on failure.
agent: Reliability agent that monitors "the nightly data sync" and reroutes around failures.
checklist: Confirm the root cause of "the nightly data sync" is addressed, not just the symptom.
Deploy the workflow, automation, and agent that own it.
Set the reminder and record the SOP, knowledge update, and policy.
Verify it cannot recur on the next cycle.

policy: Policy: fragile steps like "the nightly data sync" must be observable and retryable.
